center.name: 那格浦爾縣
center.summary: 那格浦爾縣是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白鹤，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Volume 2|page=138|publisher= Smithsonian Institution and Lynx Edicions}} The western population winters in Iran and some individuals formerly wintered in India south to Nagpur and east to Bihar

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Volume 2|page=138|publisher= Smithsonian Institution and Lynx Edicions}} The western population winters in Iran and some individuals formerly wintered in India south to Nagpur and east to Bihar
